about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Smart Mahalla — a modern digital services platform for neighborhoods (mahallas) in Uzbekistan.
about.missionText: Smart Mahalla connects neighborhood residents with verified craftsmen and service providers. Our goal is to digitalize neighborhood life and make local services convenient, reliable, and transparent.
about.whatWeDoText: We bring electricians, plumbers, tutors, cleaners, and many other professionals together on one platform. Residents place orders, chat with providers in real time, and rate the service — all in a single app.

trust.title: Trust
trust.desc: Every craftsman is verified by the neighborhood administrator.

community.title: Community
community.desc: A digital space that brings neighborhood residents together.

convenience.title: Convenience
convenience.desc: Find the service you need in just a few minutes.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: An open rating system through reviews and ratings.

about.coverage: We currently operate in 8 neighborhoods of Tashkent city and are expanding across the whole republic soon.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a question, suggestion, or issue? Write to us.
contact.successToast: Your message has been received! We'll get back to you soon.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions.

pricing.a: No. Using Smart Mahalla is completely free for neighborhood residents. Workers also list their services for free.

verification.a: After registering, each worker uploads their documents. The neighborhood administrator reviews and approves them. Only approved workers receive a "verified" badge.

coverage.q: Which areas do you operate in?
coverage.a: We are currently active in 8 neighborhoods of Tashkent city. We're gradually adding new areas.

ordering.q: How do I place an order?
ordering.a: Register, choose the category you need or post a request, pick a suitable worker to place an order with, and get in touch with them via chat.

becomeWorker.q: How do I register as a worker?
becomeWorker.a: When registering, select the "Worker" role, complete your profile, and upload your documents. Once approved, you can start accepting orders.

payment.a: For now, payments are arranged directly with the worker. Payment systems such as Payme/Click will be integrated in the future.

faq.notFound: Couldn't find the answer you're looking for?

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: The security of your data matters to us.

dataCollection.title: 1. What data we collect
dataCollection.body: When you register, we collect your name, phone number, and (optionally) email address. While using the service, order, address, message, and device data may be stored.

dataUse.title: 2. How we use data
dataUse.body: The data collected is used to provide the service, connect you with workers, ensure security, and improve the platform. We do not sell your data to third parties for advertising purposes.

dataSharing.title: 3. Data sharing
dataSharing.body: During the ordering process, necessary data (name, address) is shared with the relevant worker. Where required by law, data may be provided to authorized government bodies.

security.title: 4. Security
security.body: Your data is protected through encryption (HTTPS), secure authentication (HTTP-only cookies), and access restrictions. However, keep in mind that no system on the internet is 100% secure.

rights.title: 5. Your rights
rights.body: You have the right to view, edit your data, or request deletion of your account. You can do this from the settings section or by contacting support.

cookies.title: 6. Cookies
cookies.body: The platform uses cookies to maintain sessions and ensure security. You can manage cookies through your browser settings, though this may affect some features.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: Last updated: June 1, 2026

general.title: 1. General provisions
general.body: By using the Smart Mahalla platform, you fully accept these terms of use. If you do not agree with the terms, do not use the platform. The platform operates in accordance with the legislation of the Republic of Uzbekistan.

account.title: 2. Creating an account
account.body: You must provide accurate and correct information when registering. You are responsible for the security of your account (password, phone number). Creating a fake account under another person's identity is prohibited.

workers.title: 3. Workers and services
workers.body: Workers are verified by the neighborhood administrator. However, the platform is not directly responsible for the quality of services provided by workers. Order terms and pricing are agreed upon between the user and the worker.

obligations.title: 4. User obligations
obligations.body: Using the platform for unlawful purposes, insulting others, distributing spam, or engaging in fraud is prohibited. If a violation is detected, the account may be blocked.

payments.title: 5. Payments
payments.body: Using the platform is free for residents. Users will be notified in advance about any paid services introduced in the future. Payments to workers are made directly or through an integrated payment system.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of liability
liability.body: The platform is provided "as is". The platform is not liable for damages caused by technical outages or third-party services.

changes.title: 7. Changes to the terms
changes.body: We may update these terms at any time. Users will be notified of significant changes via notification. Continuing to use the platform after an update constitutes acceptance of the changes.

terms.contactNote: If you have any questions, get in touch with us through the
